body: PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk (BBKP) shares slipped 9.84% to IDR 55 per share, but foreign investors still registered a net buy of 75.3 million shares, with interest income rising 15% year-on-year to IDR 3.73 trillion in Q3 2024, and net loss decreasing 20% year-on-year to IDR 2.68 trillion. The bank's "IDAAA" rating with a stable outlook was maintained by Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia, following the implementation of improvement strategies, including the issuance of a USD 300 million global bond in Singapore, which was oversubscribed 4.5 times.
title: PT Bank KB Bukopin's stock price declines despite higher foreign buying and improved Q3 financial results.

body: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA) saw an 18.22% decline in its share price over the past month, reaching IDR 1,930 per share, with a total transaction value of IDR 1.27 trillion and a net foreign sell of 126.97 million shares. Despite a revenue increase of 110.33% year-on-year to USD 1.09 billion in the first half of 2024, the company reported a loss of USD 12.5 million, and its share price has plummeted 21.54% since the beginning of the year.
title: Merdeka Copper Gold's stock price plummets 18.22% in a month due to foreign investors' sell-off.
